title: vilan.toml
description: A Vilan package or project (workspace) manifest.

package.description: A package: a buildable, importable unit.

name.description: How other packages import this one. A valid identifier (letters, digits, underscore; no leading digit).

description.description: A short, free-text description of the package.

root.description: The package source root, relative to this manifest. `entry` and every `pkg::` module resolve against it. Default: `src`.

entry.description: The `build`/`run` entry file, resolved against `root`. Default: `main.vl`.

target.description: The default build target. `none` is a pure library (core std only) — type-checkable but not buildable without a host.

project.description: A workspace root: a set of member packages plus dependencies they inherit.

packages.description: Paths to the member package directories.

build.description: Code-generation options. A `preset` initializes every knob; individual keys then override it.

preset.description: A named starting point. `debug` is readable (indented, source names); `release` is minified and obfuscated.

indent.description: Lay the output across lines with indentation (vs one flat line).

spaces.description: Pad tokens with spaces (`a + b`, `[ 1, 2 ]`) vs tight (`a+b`, `[1,2]`).

readable-names.description: Name generated identifiers after their source (most debuggable).

debug-names.description: When `readable-names` is off, annotate obfuscated names with their source (`a/*count*/`).

server.description: Legacy full-stack server entry (a Node build). Superseded by a `[package]` with a `target`.

client.description: Legacy full-stack client entry (a browser build). Superseded by a `[package]` with a `target`.

entry.description: The entry file, relative to this manifest.

dependencies.description: Package dependencies. A bare version string is a registry dependency; the table form may instead give a local `path`.

path.description: A local path dependency, relative to this manifest.
